title: Day 6 Challenge — Has / Have
challengeTask: Write and speak 10 sentences about things you have and things you have done today, using both 'have/has' and Present Perfect correctly.
hindiTask: 10 sentences लिखें और बोलें जिसमें आपके पास क्या है और आज आपने क्या किया है — 'have/has' और Present Perfect का सही इस्तेमाल करते हुए।
successCriteria: Used have/has correctly with all subjects
Used at least 3 Present Perfect sentences
No errors like 'He have' or 'don't has'
bonusChallenge: Describe your daily schedule to a friend using 'have a meeting/breakfast/break'.
